---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for dbportal
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ""
---

## Feature Summary

<!-- A short, clear summary of the feature you are requesting. -->

## Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Why is this feature needed?
e.g. "As a user who has 50+ tables, I struggle to find a specific table quickly because..." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.
Include any relevant UI behavior, API changes, or backend logic. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you thought of any workarounds or alternative approaches? -->

## Mockups / References

<!-- Optional: attach screenshots, sketches, or links to similar features in other tools. -->

## Affected Areas

<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] Frontend (React UI)
- [ ] Backend (Express API)
- [ ] Database driver (specify: _________)
- [ ] CLI / startup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / DevOps

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context or related issues. -->
